# opnsense_quagga_bgp_peergroup (Resource)

Manages a BGP peer group on OPNsense (FRR). Requires the `os-frr` plugin.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Peer group name.

### Optional

- `default_originate` (Boolean) Originate default route to members. Defaults to `false`.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the peer group is enabled. Defaults to `true`.
- `family` (Set of String) Address families: `IPv4`, `IPv6`.
- `next_hop_self` (Boolean) Set next-hop to self. Defaults to `false`.
- `remote_as` (Number) Remote AS number (0 = unset / use remote_as_mode).
- `remote_as_mode` (String) Remote AS mode: `internal` or `external` (leave empty to use an explicit `remote_as`).
- `update_source` (String) Update source interface.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID.
